'''Alby Ermad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] armorsmith whose speciality was designing battle armor suits. Alby Ermand was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] for stealing architectural designs. He was the accomplice of [[Artzam Hathan]], who was wanted for the same crime. Alby's bounty of 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,000 credits dead was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
